description_cn: 设置网格的总体积，控制一个网格的体积。可以用于模拟充气和皱缩。使网格物体在计算过程中按照设定的体积大小发生变化。简单理解就是类似气球的充气和放气。
description_en: Controls the volume of a mesh. Can be used to simulate inflation and deflation. Makes mesh objects change size according to a set volume during calculation. Simply put, it's similar to inflating and deflating a balloon.

parameters.name: V
parameters.desc_cn: 目标体积——如果未提供，则使用起始体积。
parameters.desc_en: Target Volume - if none supplied, starting volume will be used

parameters.name: Strength
parameters.desc_cn: 约束强度，值越大效果越明显
parameters.desc_en: Constraint strength, higher value gives stronger effect

author: Kangaroo Team
